ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., office, warehouse, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment ended (null if still active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training session */,
  "duration_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in hours */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Trainer conducting the training session */,
  "training_category" TEXT /* Category of the training (e.g., technical, soft skills) */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Level of the training (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "compensation_type" TEXT /* Type of compensation (e.g., salary, bonus, benefits) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the compensation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the compensation became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_records" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., resume, contract, ID) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "new_job_title" TEXT /* New job title after promotion */,
  "new_department" TEXT /* New department after promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
